params.name: Gilded Monkey
params.description: An alloy-crafted, gold-plated monkey statue, produced concurrently with the Golden Monkey statue, boasts a one-to-one perfect replica in appearance. Despite lacking some commemorative value, it is still an exquisite piece of craftsmanship!
